title: Security Logging & Monitoring Failures

explain.what: Sensitive actions happen with no audit trail. If an attacker transfers money, deletes records, or escalates privileges, there is no log to detect it, investigate it, or prove it happened.
explain.example: Transfer $500 from account 1 to account 2 using the vulnerable endpoint. Then check the audit log — it is empty. The fixed endpoint writes every transfer to the log.
explain.impact: Attacks go undetected for months · no forensics after a breach · regulatory non-compliance

vulnerable.annotation: ⚠ The transfer succeeds but nothing is written to the audit log.

fixed.annotation: ✅ Every transfer — successful or failed — writes a timestamped entry to the audit_log table.

demoHint: Transfer money using vulnerable (no log), then transfer using fixed (logged). Compare the audit log before and after.
